prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: heart size normal, lungs clear.
ground_truth: Normal heart size. Lungs are clear. No acute cardiopulmonary process.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: mild cardiomegaly, small pleural effusion.
ground_truth: Mild cardiomegaly. Small bilateral pleural effusions.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: no acute findings.
ground_truth: No acute cardiopulmonary abnormality.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: bibasilar atelectasis.
ground_truth: Bibasilar atelectasis. No focal consolidation.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: pulmonary edema.
ground_truth: Mild pulmonary edema. No pneumothorax.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: pneumonia right lower lobe.
ground_truth: Right lower lobe consolidation consistent with pneumonia.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: pneumothorax left apex.
ground_truth: Small left apical pneumothorax. No tension features.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: stable appearance, no new findings.
ground_truth: Stable chest radiograph. No new findings compared to prior.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: support devices in place.
ground_truth: Endotracheal tube and nasogastric tube appropriately positioned.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: interstitial edema.
ground_truth: Interstitial pulmonary edema without overt alveolar filling.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: rib fracture suspected.
ground_truth: Possible nondisplaced right eighth rib fracture.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: improved pulmonary edema.
ground_truth: Improved pulmonary edema. Small residual bilateral pleural effusions.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: clear post-operative appearance.
ground_truth: Post-operative changes. No acute abnormality.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: hyperinflation.
ground_truth: Hyperinflated lungs consistent with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: enlarged cardiac silhouette.
ground_truth: Enlarged cardiac silhouette. Pulmonary vascular congestion.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: right-sided port in place.
ground_truth: Right-sided chest port with tip in the superior vena cava.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: worsening opacity.
ground_truth: Worsening right lower lobe opacity. Consider pneumonia.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: no pleural effusion.
ground_truth: No pleural effusion. No pneumothorax.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: mediastinal widening.
ground_truth: Widened mediastinum. Recommend further evaluation.

prompt: Generate a chest x-ray report: low lung volumes.
ground_truth: Low lung volumes with bibasilar atelectasis.
